'''''Practice Makes Perfect''''' was the third [[Hasbro]]/[[Toys "R" Us]]–exclusive [[Star Wars comic books|comic book]] published in [[2002]].

==Plot summary==
[[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knights]] [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]] and [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] are trapped by droids. Jumping into action, the two Jedi quickly disable them. When the lights come on, it is revealed the duel was a test. Skywalker brags about the ease, but is chastised by his master for his overconfidence.

==Continuity==
This comic briefly shows [[Plo Koon/Legends|Plo Koon]] without his mask for the first time. Fans were initially uncertain whether this image is [[canon]] within what is now the [[Star Wars Legends|Legends]] continuity. Later this was clarified when [[Purge – Seconds to Die|''Star Wars: Purge: Seconds to Die'']] featured a similar image of Koon on his homeworld of [[Dorin/Legends|Dorin]].
